scripts.test:build: rm -rf /tmp/spex-test-build && tsc --outDir /tmp/spex-test-build --rootDir . --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --lib ES2022 --resolveJsonModule --strict --noUncheckedIndexedAccess --exactOptionalPropertyTypes --skipLibCheck $(find src test -name '*.ts' -print) && cp package.json spex-catalog-index.yml /tmp/spex-test-build/ && ln -s "$PWD/node_modules" /tmp/spex-test-build/node_modules
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start --
